observations.label: Palace Structure
observations.description: The memory palace has a navigable, room-based view of the codebase
observations.evidence: The memory palace at `10_Wiki/palace/` is a navigable, room-based view of the codebase.

observations.label: Translate User Question
observations.description: AI translates the user's question into a concern
observations.evidence: 1. Translate the user's question into a **concern**.

observations.label: Palace Invariants
observations.description: The palace has specific invariants that must be maintained
observations.evidence: - Palace never stores truth — it is a view over the graph.

observations.label: Room Page
observations.description: Each room page contains specific information
observations.evidence: Each **room** page contains: - **Purpose** — one sentence naming the concern the room owns.

observations.label: Open Matching Room Page
observations.description: AI opens the matching room page

observations.label: Room Definition
observations.description: Room definitions live in the build_palace.py script
observations.evidence: Room definitions live in `ROOM_DEFS` at the top of that script.

observations.label: Update Room Definitions
observations.description: Room definitions can be updated by editing the build_palace.py script
observations.evidence: Add or re-cluster rooms there; re-run; the palace updates deterministically.

observations.label: Maintain Palace Currency
observations.description: The palace should be regenerated from the graph every time the build_palace.py script runs
observations.evidence: The palace is **regenerated from the graph every time** `scripts/build_palace.py` runs.

observations.label: Idempotent Build
observations.description: The palace build is idempotent, meaning the same graph always produces the same palace
observations.evidence: The palace build is idempotent: same graph → same palace.

observations.label: Run Build Script
observations.description: The build_palace.py script should be run to update the palace

relationships.description: Translating the user's question into a concern enables the AI to open the matching room page
Opening the matching room page is followed by reading the purpose line
Updating room definitions can cause the palace to be updated
Maintaining palace currency requires the palace build to be idempotent
